raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Climate Resilience Bond is poised to be a transformative solution providing essential funding to protect the Bay Area from the mounting impacts of climate change.",
    "San Mateo County is the most vulnerable county in California to sea level rise and the impacts from increasingly powerful storms.",
    "East Palo Alto and surrounding communities have experienced repeated flooding, which may worsen without significant investment.",
    "Rising sea levels and more frequent droughts pose an imminent threat to all of California.",
    "Assembly Bill 1567 proposes over $15.9 billion in proven strategies and equity-focused investments to protect California communities.",
    "Investing in climate resilience can also be an investment in economic resilience.",
    "Climate resilience investments can be an important stimulus for job creation across multiple industries crucial to California’s overall economic success.",
    "Wetland restoration and other nature-based projects are critical to protecting the Bay Area from sea level rise and flooding."
  ]
}
```
